body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
* Adds defensive and AD compatible clamping
* Adds some defensive checks to avoid numerical instabilities
* Introduces a Utilities.jl module for clamping function and other utilities (keeping them in Common.jl would create circular dependency with ThermodynamicsInterface)
* A few code simplifications
* Bump patch release


## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->


## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->

In the Content, I have included

- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

- [ ] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: Adds AD compatible input clamping and defensive checks to improve robustness of 1M microphysics
